raw_consumer_statement: I had paid off account and received bill for over {$1000.00} I knew h I had not purchased. I have not been to XXXX or to Home Depot in months. I had just got out of hospital and did not feel like traveling. My daughter drives me everywhere as I do not have a vehicle so she knows where I go. Home Depot stated that someone had to a driver license or social security card to purchase items, but I keep those in my wallet with my Home Depot card and they stay locked up in the truck. I know there are hackers but I can not think where anyone could have access to them. I just want charge cleared up and to stop harassing phone calls and bills when I have been working with Home Depot fraud department but do not have any answers yet and its been weeks.
